pkgmetadata.longdescription: PicoDrive is a fast and portable emulator for Sega 8/16-bit consoles and the 32X add-on, ported to libretro. It is the only open-source emulator to support the Sega 32X add-on. Supported systems include Mega Drive/Genesis, Sega CD/Mega CD, Master System, Game Gear, SG-1000 and 32X.
